name: 血之回响触发
description: 失去圣盾时触发，添加圣光充能手牌
code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] context:', JSON.stringify({ statusId: context.statusId, hasSourcePiece: !!context.sourcePiece, hasPiece: !!context.piece, playerId: context.playerId })); if (context.statusId !== 'divine-shield') return { success: false, message: '不是圣盾状态' }; const sourcePiece = context.sourcePiece || context.piece; if (!sourcePiece) return { success: false, message: '没有sourcePiece' }; console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece.name, 'ownerPlayerId:', sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId); const liadrin = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.templateId === 'liadrin' && p.ownerPlayerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!liadrin) return { success: false, message: '没有找到莉亚德琳' }; console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] found liadrin:', liadrin.name); const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId; }); if (player) { console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] adding holy-charge to player:', player.playerId); addCardToHand('holy-charge', player.playerId); return { success: true, message: '血之回响：获得1张圣光充能' }; } return { success: false, message: '没有找到玩家' }; }
